name: 16qt Heavy Duty Latching Clear Storage Box - Brightroom™: Portable Plastic Bin, Universal Storage, Black, Lidded
description:
The Brightroom™ Garage Storage Bin with lid makes it easy to organize busy spaces, from garages and basements to utility rooms. Built for demanding environments, the clear plastic bin lets you quickly see and grab what you need while keeping items protected. Rugged, secure latches hold the lid firmly in place during carrying and stacking, while the textured surface provides a comfortable, non-slip grip. Deep recessed lids give stability when stacking and maximize vertical storage space. This 16 quart storage container is ideal for small tools, cords, cleaning supplies, sports accessories, and garden tools, delivering dependable, versatile storage for every space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
